task: put the grasped yellow block inside the right cabinet
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A yellow block is on a brown countertop. A white cabinet with an open right door is visible. The cabinet interior is empty. The yellow block is a cube with a matte surface. STRATEGY - First, reach for the yellow block to grasp it. Then, transport it to the open cabinet. Finally, place the block inside the cabinet. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misaligning it with the cabinet opening. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the block at its body for initial contact. Step 2 grasp the block at its body for secure hold. Step 3 transport the block towards the cabinet. Step 4 place the block inside the cabinet opening.

Goal: inside(yellow_block, cabinet)
Scene: yellow_block, cabinet, countertop
Step 1: reach(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: holding(yellow_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_block)
Step 3: transport(yellow_block -> cabinet)
  affordance_region: the open interior of the cabinet
  spatial: above(yellow_block, cabinet, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_block)
  done_when: above(yellow_block, cabinet, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_block -> cabinet)
  affordance_region: the open interior of the cabinet
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_block, cabinet) [completion]; released(yellow_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_block, cabinet) AND released(yellow_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
the body of the yellow block
the open interior of the cabinet
the open interior of the cabinet
